summary: Replace embedding model call in embed_corpus.py with Google text-embedding-005 (768d native)

resolution.note: embed_google() added to EMBED_FNS; import deferred inside the function so existing ollama/sentence_transformers/api callers still work without google-generativeai installed. Switching the live pipeline to Google happens by flipping provider='google' in config/embedding.toml (documented in commented stanza from 8882a4a1).
